series_metadata.series_description: Surety bonds, financial statements, Certificates of Deposit, Insurance Certificates, ownership records, Authority and Organization forms for oil and gas wells.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain for life of well(s). Upon cancellation - then destroy. ; Paper: Retain for life of well(s). Upon cancellation - then destroy. If scanned into an electronic format, the paper copy may be destroyed., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Wastepaper
